script:
BURL=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-url --query value -o tsv)
BTOK=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-token --query value -o tsv)
ej() {
  curl -s -m 18 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $BTOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    "$BURL/edge/execute_js" --data "$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"tab_url_contains":sys.argv[1],"js":sys.argv[2]}))' "$1" "$2")"
}

sleep 8
echo === Install app ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var b=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button,[role=button]")).find(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").trim().endsWith("Install app");}); if(b){b.click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_install_btn"})}'
sleep 4

echo === Open dropdown ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var d=document.getElementById("deployedToDropdown"); if(d){d.click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_dd"})}'
sleep 2

echo === Specific users ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var o=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[role=option]")).find(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").indexOf("Specific users")>=0;}); if(o){o.click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_specific"})}'
sleep 3

echo === Type heather ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var p=document.querySelector("input[aria-label=\"Search for users or groups\"]"); if(p){p.focus(); var s=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,"value").set; s.call(p,"heather"); p.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true})); p.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); p.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown",{bubbles:true,key:"r"})); p.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keyup",{bubbles:true,key:"r"})); JSON.stringify({val:p.value})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_picker"})}'
sleep 5

echo === Click Dr. Heather ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var sugs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("*")).filter(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").indexOf("Heather")>=0 && (e.innerText||"").length<80;}); sugs.sort(function(a,b){return (a.innerText||"").length-(b.innerText||"").length}); if(sugs.length){sugs[0].click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true,t:(sugs[0].innerText||"").slice(0,60)})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_sug"})}'
sleep 3

echo === Apply ===
ej "manage-apps/922fe8e1" 'var b=document.getElementById("flexPaneApply"); if(b){b.click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_apply"})}'
sleep 6

echo === Verify via Graph ===
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv)
ITOK=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' \
  -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' \
  -d "refresh_token=$RT_YM" -d 'scope=TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/h-i -w '%{http_code}' -X POST 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/0e06a27c-11e0-442a-b6a7-10bedc7e4364/teamwork/installedApps' \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $ITOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"teamsApp@odata.bind":"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/922fe8e1-c937-4d74-a73f-66fcfc26da10"}')
echo install=$CODE
head -c 300 /tmp/h-i; echo
